blended.narrative: Okemo is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,736 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
